overview: Functional medicine clinic offering comprehensive wellness consultations focused on nutrition, lifestyle, and root-cause analysis of chronic health concerns. Provides care through in-person appointments at eight Florida locations and virtual consultations with Dr. David B. Tuchinsky.
highlights: Virtual and in-office appointments across Florida
Comprehensive testing including blood work and heavy metal analysis
targetAudience: Individuals with chronic health concerns unaddressed by conventional medicine seeking a functional medicine approach.
